mission.title: Mission
mission.description: BufferLine builds the Cognitive OS for human-AI judgment delegation. We develop observation, extraction, and governance infrastructure to make judgment shifts visible and governable.

system.title: What we build
system.description: Three independent domains in one Cognitive OS.
system.jdvp: JDVP — Judgment Delegation Visibility Protocol. An observation protocol that tracks where judgment moves during AI interaction.
system.thinkprint: Thinkprint — Reasoning pattern extraction protocol. Externalizes thinking patterns into inspectable, shareable modes.
system.metagovernance: Meta Governance — Authority architecture domain for designing how power flows and stabilizes across agents and humans.

company.title: Company Information
company.name: BUFFERLINE LABS PTE. LTD.
company.type: Exempt Private Company Limited by Shares

founder.title: Founder
founder.name: Sangwon (Sean) Seo
founder.bio: Blockchain engineer turned cognitive infrastructure builder. Previously Head of Blockchain at Helios and Head of Engineering at Lucidefi.
